title: Q1 Tech Review — Meridian Engineering
extracted_text: Summary of Q1 technology decisions. Alice led the database evaluation; Postgres was chosen for the Atlas project. Bob drove infrastructure, standardising on Docker and Kubernetes. The team agreed: Python for backend, TypeScript for frontend.
author: bob

title: Phoenix Architecture Diagram (Notes)
extracted_text: Phoenix uses Kafka for event streaming between microservices. Redis handles the session cache. Grace owns the Orion integration layer. Dave is responsible for the React-based monitoring dashboard.
author: dave

title: Security Review — Atlas API
extracted_text: Atlas API uses JWT for authentication via OAuth. Alice approved the security model. Open question: should we add rate limiting at the Nginx layer? TBD pending load test results from Bob.
author: alice
